title: Policy: Manage Policies for Multiple Devices
scenario: Policy-managed settings do not reflect correct locked/unlocked states per device when navigating between multiple connected Poly devices in Device Settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Connect two or more Poly Bluetooth audio devices (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200 and Poly Voyager 4320).
Create a new policy that locks specific settings (e.g., ANC, Equalizer) for one device and leaves them unlocked for another.
Apply the policy to both connected devices.
Go back to the Home screen and tap on the first connected device (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200).
Navigate to Device Settings → Audio Settings → ANC.
Observe whether the ANC setting is locked (grayed out / non-interactive) or unlocked.
Return to Home screen and tap on the second connected device (e.g., Poly Voyager 4320).
Navigate to Device Settings → Audio Settings → ANC.
Observe whether the ANC setting is locked or unlocked according to its respective policy.
expected: Each connected device's settings correctly reflect their respective applied policies, showing the correct locked (non-interactive) or unlocked (interactive) states as defined in the policy.
